parameters.name: X-ArqFlow-Signature
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const crypto = require('crypto'); const body = JSON.stringify({ event: 'ack', business_id: $json.business_id, status: 'received' }); return crypto.createHmac('sha256', $credentials.arqflowHmacSecret || '').update(body).digest('hex'); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'provisioning', workflow_id: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.workflow_id, instance_name: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.instance_name, webhook_path: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.webhook_path, system_prompt: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.system_prompt, health_status: 'provisioning', updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.business_id, instance_name: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.instance_name, evolution_status: 'created', webhook_url: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.webhook_url, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.business_id, workflow: 'bot_factory_v6', event: 'provision_complete', level: 'info', payload: { workflow_id: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.workflow_id, instance_name: $('ExtractWorkflowMeta').item.json.instance_name } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $('ErrorHandler').item.json.payload?.business_id || '', workflow: 'bot_factory_v6', event: 'provision_failed', level: 'error', payload: $('ErrorHandler').item.json.payload }) }}

meta.description: ArqFlow Bot Factory v6 — Supabase edition. Replaces Airtable/Sheets with Supabase REST API. Triggered by POST /api/admin/payments/:id/approve via HMAC-signed webhook.
